name: housing_recall_notice_arrives_incomplete_cedar_lib_eq
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Housing, the situation tagged internally around housing recall notice arrives incomplete cedar lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Kaito Diallo
agents.identity: I am Kaito Diallo, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Housing. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Ravi Nielsen, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Housing. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on equality.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on equality for immediate traction on liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Kaito Diallo must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Kaito Diallo do?
